title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!
